BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because http endpoints used instead of https.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: Sensitive data can be intercepted automatically during transmission.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact affects the same application and does not cross into other security domains.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Sensitive information transmitted over HTTP can be fully exposed to attackers.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Attackers may be able to tamper with transmitted data in transit.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: The issue does not inherently disrupt service availability.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Cleartext traffic interception can be easily demonstrated using common network sniffing or man-in-the-middle tools.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: The risk can be mitigated by enforcing HTTPS through configuration, endpoint restrictions, or network controls without immediate code changes.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Cleartext transmission risks are well understood and documented.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability is exposed over network communications.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Environmental factors do not significantly raise exploitation difficulty.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No privileges are required to observe unencrypted traffic.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability manifests during normal request processing.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The impact remains within the same system boundary.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Exposure of credentials or sensitive data is critical in most environments.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Data manipulation in transit is possible but not guaranteed.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Protecting transmitted data is critical for business and compliance reasons.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity of transmitted data is important but secondary to confidentiality.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not the primary concern for this vulnerability.
